title: AgentCore Managed Harness: Getting Started
summary: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness is a service that simplifies AI agent deployment by replacing manual container and orchestration setup with JSON config and system prompts. It provides isolated micro VMs, persistent storage, cross-session memory, and hot-swappable models and tools, with integrations to browsers, code interpreters, and external services like Telegram.
